name: Montgomery OneAlabama — 2-1-1 Helpline
notes: Call 2-1-1 for immediate connection to local resources. Available 24/7.

name: Alabama JOBS Program (DHR)
notes: Mandatory for able-bodied TANF recipients. Provides transportation vouchers.

name: Montgomery Area Transit System (MATS) — The M
notes: 31-day pass available at MATS office. No Sunday service. Download TransLoc app for real-time tracking.

name: Salvation Army — Montgomery
notes: Walk-in for food pantry. Shelter requires intake appointment.

name: Montgomery Area Food Bank
notes: Mobile pantry schedule varies. Call for distribution times and locations.

name: GreenPath Financial Wellness
address: 36 S Court Street, Suite 400, Montgomery, AL 36104
eligibility: Open to all, free initial consultation
notes: HUD-approved nonprofit. Free credit report review. Debt management plans can reduce interest rates and consolidate payments.

name: Consumer Credit Counseling Service of Central Alabama
address: 600 South Court Street, Suite 300, Montgomery, AL 36104
notes: Nonprofit. Sliding scale fees. Walk-ins welcome for initial consultation. Ask about free financial literacy workshops.
